title: cyclosorus costatus
intro: Cyclosorus costatus, also known as the Indian fern or costus root, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus costatus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
